perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A man with bleached hair wearing a maroon hoodie performs Wing Chun hand gestures in front of a shelf filled with collectibles. (2) He transitions into aggressive martial arts punches and strikes towards the camera with an exaggerated, fierce expression. (3) The scene cuts to him 'fighting' an individual wearing a chimpanzee mask and a plaid vest; the man is repeatedly slapped in the face by the chimpanzee. (4) The man stops the fight, looking dizzy and distressed, holding his head while pleading for the hitting to stop.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy, upbeat music starts. A male voice speaks loudly and confidently in a mix of Cantonese and Mandarin, introducing himself as a martial arts master. (2) Rapid, rhythmic percussion SFX accompany his punches. (3) Sharp 'slap' SFX play in quick succession as he is hit. (4) The music continues as the male voice shifts to a high-pitched, desperate, and humorous tone, pleading for mercy while ambient room quiet remains in the background.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: '是的 我是正宗詠春 賣問' (Yes, I am authentic Wing Chun Mai Wen). Tone: Boastful. (2) Functional Text: '師承 陳華順 葉問' (Taught by Chen Huashun, Ip Man). Tone: Proud. (3) Decorative Text: '喝!' (Heh!) and '叫你賣問 你還問?' (I told you 'Mai Wen', you still ask?). Tone: Aggressive/Mocking. (4) Functional Text: '不要再打了 再打就腦震盪了' (Stop hitting, any more and I'll have a concussion). Tone: Humorous and desperate.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro with martial arts demo -> Comedic conflict with a masked character -> Humorous defeat.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main male creator and 1 person wearing a chimpanzee mask.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young male with dyed blonde/bleached hair, wearing a maroon/burgundy hoodie.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A room with shelves containing Coca-Cola memorabilia, baseballs in display cases, and framed pictures. A black cabinet or door is visible in the background.

vocal_qualities.tone: Loud, shifting from boastful to comedic distress

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To entertain the audience by parodying traditional martial arts films (specifically Ip Man). The video sets up a serious tone of a Wing Chun master only to subvert it with a comedic slapstick scene involving a person in a monkey mask, highlighting the creator's humorous personality.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Exaggerated facial expressions and self-deprecating comedy.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The use of 'Mai Wen' (賣問) is a pun on 'Ip Man' (葉問), contributing to the comedic wordplay.
